heading: Custom Storage Speed
body:
For most cluster types, you can increase storage speed from
**Standard** to **Fast** or **Fastest**,
which affects costs. Selecting a custom speed changes both IOPS (Input/Output Operations per Second)
and the type of storage used. The storage type changes from a
general-purpose SSD (Solid State Disk) to a provisioned-IOPS (Input/Output Operations per Second) SSD (Solid State Disk).
To learn more about storage types, see
[Amazon EBS Volume Types](http://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/UserGuide/EBSVolumeTypes.html).
